prompt: A dynamic, 1920s Soviet Constructivist poster (Agitprop style) representing 'Gradient Descent'. Composition: Powerful diagonal red and black geometric planes intersecting across a textured cream-colored paper background. A sequence of thick, tapering red bars rhythmically descends in a stepped, jagged path from the top-left toward a solid, centered black circular void at the bottom-right. Visual grammar: Stark minimalism, no decorative elements, high-contrast, flat areas of unmodulated color, heavy woodblock-ink texture, bold geometric abstraction. No text, no letters, no icons. Soviet Constructivist grammar. Red, Black, and Cream palette only.
tradition_approach: Targeted the Agitprop aesthetic: heavy diagonal compositional axis, restricted Red/Black/Cream palette, and rhythmic geometric abstraction to map the iterative optimization steps as converging planes descending toward a global minimum.
